_about.title: AI Tool Age Audit
_about.method: Every age floor below was read from a page owned by the vendor and quoted verbatim. No age was taken from a search result, a summary, or an app-store rating. Where a vendor publishes no age at all, this file says so rather than guessing.
_about.why_this_exists: Vendor age floors track contract law and data-protection liability (COPPA, GDPR Art. 8, India's DPDP Act 2023), not whether a tool is suitable for a child. That is why so many ordinary AI tools bar under-13s, and why some perfectly safe-looking ones bar under-18s.

buckets.keep: Usable at 13 in every market we teach in.
buckets.keep_with_consent: Usable at 13 once a parent or guardian consents. The student remains the account holder.
buckets.age_16: Clean floor above 13 with nothing else disqualifying. Our 16-18 students may use it; our 13-15 students may not.
buckets.remove_age: Floor above 13 that consent cannot cure, or the adult must BE the account holder.
buckets.remove_risk: Age-permitted, but the content or safety posture is wrong for a minor.
buckets.unverified: The vendor publishes no age, or the name does not resolve to one product. Silence is not permission.

_about.known_contradiction: Two independent audits disagreed on thispersondoesnotexist.com: one found it parked, the other found it alive with This House Does Not Exist parked instead. It is excluded either way (a face generator with no terms and no age policy), but this file does not pretend the point is settled.

text_ai.name: ChatGPT
text_ai.floor: 13; parental permission required 13-17. Self-escalates to the local consent age, and OpenAI publishes no country table.
text_ai.quote: You must be at least 13 years old or the minimum age required in your country to consent to use the Services. If you are under 18 you must have your parent or legal guardian's permission to use the Services.
text_ai.note: Vendor's own warning: "ChatGPT may produce output that is not appropriate for all audiences or all ages."

text_ai.name: Perplexity AI
text_ai.floor: 13 flat. No regional escalator anywhere in the document.
text_ai.quote: You must be 13 years of age or older to use the Services. Minors under the age of majority in their jurisdiction but that are at least 13 years of age are only permitted to use the Services if the minor's parent or guardian accepts these Terms on the minor's behalf prior to use of the Services.
text_ai.note: The cleanest text tool audited. The guardian must accept the terms BEFORE first use - an onboarding step, not a bar.

text_ai.name: Microsoft Copilot
text_ai.floor: 13 in UK/US/UAE. 18 in India, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Germany, France, Italy. 16 in Portugal/Malta/Slovenia. 14 in Spain/Austria.
text_ai.quote: You must be at least 13 years old to use Copilot, and in some countries, the minimum age may be higher depending on regional requirement. ... In these countries or regions, children under the statutory age must have a parent manage their account. ... India - Age 18.
text_ai.note: Microsoft is one of the few vendors that publishes a per-country table. India = 18 is Microsoft's own figure, and it independently corroborates the DPDP reading.

text_ai.name: Claude (Anthropic)
text_ai.floor: 18 everywhere, or higher where local law requires.
text_ai.quote: Minimum age. You must be at least 18 years old or the minimum age required to consent to use the Services in your location, whichever is higher.
text_ai.note: "Whichever is higher" means there is no downward relief, and the consumer terms offer no parental-consent route. Bars the entire 13-18 cohort.

text_ai.name: Google Gemini
text_ai.floor: 13 general; 16 in Germany, Ireland, Netherlands, Poland and others; 15 in France; 14 in Spain, Italy, Austria.
text_ai.quote: You must be 13 (or the applicable age in your country) or over to use Gemini with a personal or school Google Account and 18 or over to use Gemini with a work account. ... You still can't access the Gemini web app with a Google Account managed by Family Link.
text_ai.note: The Family Link exclusion is decisive. In the EU-16 states a 13-year-old cannot manage their own account, and the parent-supervised account is explicitly blocked from Gemini. There is no compliant route, so consent cannot cure it.

text_ai.name: You.com
text_ai.floor: 18, or the local age of majority.
text_ai.quote: In order to enter into this Agreement, you must at least 18 years old, or have reached the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction of residence, and be fully able and competent to enter into the terms, conditions, obligations, affirmations, representation and warranties set forth in this Agreement.
text_ai.note: Contract-capacity framing: the user themselves must be competent to contract. No parental mechanism is offered.

text_ai.name: Pi (Inflection)
text_ai.quote: Finally, our Services are not intended for minors under the age of 18. If you are a minor under the age of 18, you may not use the Services.
text_ai.note: Alive, not dead - the terms were updated December 2025. "You may not use the Services" admits no consent cure.

text_ai.name: Poe by Quora
text_ai.quote: Use of Poe by anyone under 13 years of age is prohibited. ... Bots accessed via Poe may produce content that is not suitable for minors.
text_ai.note: The vendor admits its bots may produce content unsuitable for minors in the same clause that permits 13-year-olds, with no gate between the two. Poe aggregates third-party bots and disclaims responsibility for them.

image_ai.name: Midjourney
image_ai.floor: 13 plus the local digital-consent age, conjunctive - so 16 in EU-16 states, 18 in India.
image_ai.quote: By accessing the Services, You confirm that You are at least 13 years old and meet the minimum age of digital consent in Your country.
image_ai.note: Content default is SFW. Real-person likeness is NOT banned outright - only harmful use is. Note the community is "open-by-default", so student generations are public.

image_ai.name: Bing Image Creator
image_ai.floor: 13 in UK/US/UAE; 16 in other EU; 18 in India, Saudi Arabia, Qatar.
image_ai.quote: In these countries or regions, children under the statutory age must have a parent manage their account. ... India - Age 18. ... United Kingdom - Age 13.
image_ai.note: Alive. Requires a Microsoft account, so the statutory table governs. Content is filtered by default.

image_ai.name: Leonardo.ai
image_ai.quote: You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum legal age required to provide consent for processing of personal data in the country where the child is located). If you are under the age of 18, you must have obtained the consent of your parents or guardian or supervision of a responsible adult to use our Platform.
image_ai.note: Best content posture of the image tools: the NSFW filter is a DEFAULT, not an opt-in. The vendor concedes it is not rigid and suggests adding your own moderation layer.

image_ai.name: DALL-E 3
image_ai.floor: n/a - retired from the API on 12 May 2026.
image_ai.quote: On November 14th, 2025, we notified developers using DALL·E model snapshots of their deprecation and removal from the API on May 12, 2026.
image_ai.note: Superseded by gpt-image-*. Any course teaching DALL-E 3 is teaching a product that no longer exists.

image_ai.name: Stable Diffusion
image_ai.quote: Our technology is created for use by adults, and as such, you must be 18 years of age or the minimum age required to use Stability AI Technology in your location, whichever is higher. ... This includes non-commercial, research, and commercial uses of Stability AI Technology, including self-hosting Stability AI code or weights.
image_ai.note: The policy binds the MODEL, not just the website - self-hosting does not escape it. DreamStudio, the front-end most tutorials point at, now redirects to an unrelated company.

image_ai.name: Craiyon
image_ai.floor: Age of majority (18 in our markets).
image_ai.quote: By using the Site, you represent that you are at least the age of majority in your jurisdiction of residence.
image_ai.note: No parental mechanism offered at all. Its conduct rules contain no general adult-content ban for adult subjects.

image_ai.name: Deep Dream Generator
image_ai.quote: You must be at least 16 years old to use the Service.
image_ai.note: Content posture is strong - it bans prohibited sexual content and deepfakes of identifiable real people. The 16 floor is the only issue, so 16-18 students may use it.

image_ai.name: NightCafe
image_ai.floor: No hard floor; under-16 needs a guardian to accept.
image_ai.quote: You, or our Moderators, may also tag any User Content using our Not Safe for Work filter (NSFW Filter). Any User Content tagged with our NSFW Filter will only be visible to users who have opted in to view User Content that has been tagged using the NSFW Filter.
image_ai.note: NSFW is uploader-tagged and viewer-opt-in, not a default classifier - so untagged adult content is visible to everyone by construction. The vendor's own rules contemplate content "whether or not" it is tagged.

image_ai.name: Artbreeder
image_ai.quote: Age Restrictions • You must be at least 13 years old to use Artbreeder. ... You agree to license any images you create on Artbreeder under the Creative Commons CC0 license. This effectively releases any image you create on Artbreeder into the public domain.
image_ai.note: The terms contain no content policy, no NSFW clause and no likeness policy at all, on a face-breeding tool, and were last updated in 2019. Separately, every image a student makes is released to the public domain, and that survives deleting the account.

image_ai.name: Hugging Face
image_ai.quote: You must be at least age 13.
image_ai.note: Worse than its terms suggest: explicit models are reachable while logged out with no age gate, and the not-for-all-audiences tag is uploader opt-in rather than a default.

learning_and_research.name: Wolfram Alpha
learning_and_research.floor: Under-18 permitted with permission from a parent, guardian OR TEACHER. No account needed to query.
learning_and_research.quote: If you are under age 18 you may use Wolfram|Alpha only if you have permission from a parent, legal guardian, or teacher. By using the service, you are telling us either that you are over the age of 18 and legally able to form contracts or that an adult with authority to act on your behalf has agreed to these terms.
learning_and_research.note: The cleanest consent mechanic found anywhere in this audit, and the only vendor that names a TEACHER as a valid consenting adult, which fits a taught course exactly. The minor remains the user.

learning_and_research.name: Duolingo Max
learning_and_research.floor: Under-13s permitted as restricted Child Users, in every region.
learning_and_research.quote: Duolingo treats Child Users (meaning users under the age of 13 in the United States or another age of digital consent in their country) differently... Child Users are permitted to create a Duolingo account, but instead of using an email address, we ask them to register using a username that is not tied to their real name.
learning_and_research.note: Duolingo sidesteps consent by collecting no personal data. Its Terms have no age clause at all; the floor lives only in the incorporated Privacy Policy. Max is a paid subscription a minor cannot contract for, so a parent must purchase.

learning_and_research.name: Khan Academy Khanmigo
learning_and_research.floor: 13, or the local consent age; under-13s permitted via parent or school.
learning_and_research.quote: Any use of AI-Enabled Features by persons under age 18 must be supervised by an authorized adult User (their Parent, teacher or other School Personnel). Each account held by a Student or minor with access to AI-Enabled Features must be associated with an account held by an authorized teacher or other School Personnel or by a Parent.
learning_and_research.note: Not a checkbox: the student's account must be LINKED to a parent or teacher account, and use must be supervised. A self-serve 13-year-old cannot lawfully get Khanmigo standalone.

learning_and_research.name: Elicit
learning_and_research.floor: 13 per the Terms. Its own privacy policy says 18, so the two documents disagree.
learning_and_research.quote: You must be thirteen (13) years of age or older to access or use the Service. If you are under the age of 13, you must have the explicit permission of your parent or guardian to use the Service and must use an Account established by your parent or guardian.
learning_and_research.note: The privacy policy's 18 carries an express guardian-consent branch, so it stays curable, but a vendor contradicting itself is worth watching. Note /terms and /terms-of-service both 404; the real document is at /operations/terms.

learning_and_research.name: Brainly
learning_and_research.floor: 13 plus local uplift. India: a contract-capable parent must agree on the child's behalf.
learning_and_research.quote: You must be at least 13 years old (or of the required minimum age by the laws of the state or country that you reside) and have obtained parental or guardian consent if further required by the laws of the country that you reside in order to use Brainly Services.
learning_and_research.note: The only vendor in the whole audit with an explicit India section, which makes the parent the contracting party.

learning_and_research.name: Photomath
learning_and_research.quote: Vendor terms set a 13 floor.
learning_and_research.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

learning_and_research.name: Consensus
learning_and_research.quote: Vendor terms set a 13 floor.
learning_and_research.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

learning_and_research.name: Scholarcy
learning_and_research.quote: Vendor terms set a 13 floor.
learning_and_research.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

learning_and_research.name: QuillBot
learning_and_research.floor: Age of majority (18), with an absolute floor of 16.
learning_and_research.quote: You must have attained the age of majority and have the ability to provide consent to data processing under the laws in your country, state, or province in order to use the Learneo Services. The Learneo Services are not intended to be accessed or utilized by children under 16 years of age under any circumstances.
learning_and_research.note: "Under any circumstances" forecloses parental consent. The bar is NOT in quillbot.com/terms; it lives in the incorporated Learneo terms, so reading the obvious page would miss it. Separately, it markets an AI Humanizer and an AI Detector, and terminates students caught cheating.

learning_and_research.name: Semantic Scholar
learning_and_research.floor: 18 flat, and it binds on USE, not on registration.
learning_and_research.quote: By using the Services and their features, You represent and warrant that: (i) You are 18 years or older.
learning_and_research.note: A free, login-less academic search site that carries 18+ because it has no terms of its own; the floor arrives from its parent, AI2. Needing no account does not rescue it, because the bar is on use.

learning_and_research.name: GPTZero
learning_and_research.floor: 18 flat, binds on use.
learning_and_research.quote: The Site is intended for users who are at least 18 years old. Persons under the age of 18 are not permitted to use or register for the Site.
learning_and_research.note: Two independent bars: flat 18, and a registration representation that you are not a minor.

learning_and_research.name: Deepware Scanner
learning_and_research.quote: Our Services are not intended for use by children under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from Children under 18.
learning_and_research.note: The Terms contain zero age words; the only floor is in the privacy policy, which the scan button incorporates.

learning_and_research.name: Be My Eyes
learning_and_research.floor: 18 flat, with no consent mechanic anywhere in the document.
learning_and_research.quote: You must be at least 18 years old to use any of the Services.
learning_and_research.note: Would warrant exclusion even at 13: it connects a child to an unvetted volunteer stranger through their live phone camera, with no teacher in the loop. Calls may be licensed to third parties. "Be My AI" is defined inside the same Services, so it is not an escape hatch.

learning_and_research.name: Trash AI
learning_and_research.floor: None. No account, and inference runs in the browser.
learning_and_research.quote: Trash AI is open source and free to use however you see fit. You may classify images and download the data.
learning_and_research.note: The cleanest tool in the entire audit. Images need not leave the device.

learning_and_research.name: Orange Data Mining
learning_and_research.floor: None. Installed GPL-3.0 desktop software, no account.
learning_and_research.quote: Orange is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License.
learning_and_research.note: No signup or login exists. From the University of Ljubljana.

learning_and_research.name: PlantNet
learning_and_research.floor: None stated; no account needed to identify plants.
learning_and_research.quote: Using Pl@ntNet identification service and consulting data do not require creation of a user account, but this action is necessary to participate to the project's enrichment.
learning_and_research.note: Keep students on the identify-only path: contributions are published CC-BY-SA with GPS coordinates and the contributor's name, and other users can email contributors directly.

learning_and_research.name: iNaturalist
learning_and_research.floor: 13 to make an account, exactly our floor, so zero margin. The EU/UK uplift could not be verified because the site is Cloudflare-walled.
learning_and_research.quote: Users must be at least 13 years old to make an account.
learning_and_research.note: Its own guidance warns observations are "public records of where someone was at a certain time and place", so a student posting from home publishes a timestamped location trail. Use obscured geoprivacy, and prefer Seek for 13-15s.

learning_and_research.name: What3Words
learning_and_research.floor: None for lookup. Account: 13 plus local uplift. Pro: 18, or 13-17 with parental permission.
learning_and_research.quote: In order to sign up for a what3words account, you must be at least 13 years of age, or any greater age as is required by applicable laws in your country.
learning_and_research.note: Basic lookup is ungated. "Saved Locations" would store a minor's home or school address.

learning_and_research.name: Seeing AI
learning_and_research.floor: Age of majority, expressly cured by parental agreement.
learning_and_research.quote: By creating a Microsoft account or using the Services, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms and represent that you have either reached the age of "majority" where you live or your parent or legal guardian agrees to be bound by these Terms on your behalf.
learning_and_research.note: Seeing AI appears verbatim in the Microsoft Services Agreement's product list. It binds on use, with or without an account.

learning_and_research.name: Unity ML-Agents
learning_and_research.floor: Package: none (Apache-2.0). Unity Editor: the local consent age. Publishing or Asset Store: 18, uncured.
learning_and_research.quote: You must be at least the age to consent to processing of your personal data in your country of residence (e.g., 13 in the US, 16 in the EU). ... You must be at least 18 years old to make Purchases or submit User Content to Unity.
learning_and_research.note: Local builds are fine. Publishing to the Asset Store or forums trips an 18 bar with no guardian workaround.

learning_and_research.name: Edge Impulse
learning_and_research.floor: 18 plus express capacity to contract.
learning_and_research.quote: accessing or using the Site, and/or using a Service, (i) you agree to these Terms and (ii) you represent that you are at least 18 years old and have the right, authority and capacity to enter into these Terms.
learning_and_research.note: Binds on accessing the site, not merely on signup.

learning_and_research.name: CodePen
learning_and_research.floor: 18 flat.
learning_and_research.quote: The Services are available only to individuals who have the capacity to form legally binding contracts under the law applicable to these Terms of Service. Furthermore, our services are not available to minors (under 18 years of age).
learning_and_research.note: Its plain-English column says "have your legal guardian sign up for you", which makes the GUARDIAN the account holder, so the student is not a permitted user and consent cures nothing. Note codepen.io/legal returns HTTP 200 while serving a user profile.

learning_and_research.name: Replit AI
learning_and_research.floor: "An adult". The only carve-out is written for under-13s.
learning_and_research.quote: 4. Minimum Age - You must be an adult to use the Service. If you are younger than 13 we will allow you to use the Service if you first provide us with your parent or guardian's written consent.
learning_and_research.note: A drafting gap that lands exactly on this cohort: a 13-17 year old is neither "an adult" nor "younger than 13", so is not clearly permitted. No education product exists to escape to. Separately, public Apps are auto-MIT-licensed and feed LLM training, which a 13-year-old cannot validly grant.

learning_and_research.name: Speechify
learning_and_research.floor: 18, or the age of majority.
learning_and_research.quote: You must be 18 years of age, or the age of majority in your province, territory or country, to use the Services or Apps. Individuals under the age of 18 ... may utilize the Services and Apps only with the involvement and consent of a parent or legal guardian, under such person's account.
learning_and_research.note: The minor must operate under the PARENT'S account, so the student is not a permitted account holder. Its own privacy policy contradicts this with a 13-plus-local-uplift model.

learning_and_research.name: NaturalReader
learning_and_research.floor: None stated in any region. Verified absence, not a failed fetch.
learning_and_research.quote: To protect student and children's privacy, we comply with requirements of FERPA, COPPA and New York Ed. Law 2-D in the United States and GDPR in Europe... We don't collect any personally identifiable information.
learning_and_research.note: Explicitly serves school students and runs a dedicated education product. The real licence is a PDF download; /terms.html 404s.

learning_and_research.name: Roblox (AI features)
learning_and_research.floor: Age of majority, expressly cured by parental consent, so it PASSES on age.
learning_and_research.quote: IF YOU ARE UNDER THE LEGAL AGE OF MAJORITY (A "MINOR") ... YOUR PARENT OR LEGAL GUARDIAN MUST READ AND CONSENT TO THE ROBLOX TERMS.
learning_and_research.note: Excluded on safety, not age. Roblox gates chat for under-13s, so at exactly 13 a student AGES INTO Party, Direct and Voice chat with strangers by default. Age verification can require facial geometry. May return if used as local Studio only, with no publishing, chat, or logged-in session.

learning_and_research.name: ScholarAI
learning_and_research.floor: 13 stated, but the name does not resolve to one product.
learning_and_research.quote: ScholarAI is for users aged 13 and over.
learning_and_research.note: The vendor publishes no Terms of Service at all, and the 13 rests on a privacy policy rewritten two days before this audit. If the syllabus meant the ChatGPT plugin, OpenAI's terms govern instead.

learning_and_research.name: FakeCatcher (Intel)
learning_and_research.floor: Not applicable; no consumer product exists.
learning_and_research.quote: Intel's real-time deepfake detection ... runs on a server and interfaces through a web-based platform.
learning_and_research.note: Intel Labs research with B2B framing. No signup, no trial, no terms; nothing a student can use.

creative_and_media.name: Canva AI
creative_and_media.floor: 13; under-13 only via Canva Education under teacher supervision.
creative_and_media.quote: AI-powered products are for users aged 13 years and over unless used as part of Canva Education under teach supervision.
creative_and_media.note: The typo is Canva's own.

creative_and_media.name: Khroma
creative_and_media.floor: None. No account, runs client-side, and no terms document exists.
creative_and_media.quote: No terms of service exists to quote; /terms and /privacy both 404.
creative_and_media.note: Colour palette AI. No sign-up.

creative_and_media.name: Fontjoy
creative_and_media.floor: None. No account.
creative_and_media.quote: No terms of service exists to quote.
creative_and_media.note: Font pairing. Optional newsletter only.

creative_and_media.name: Adobe Express and Adobe Podcast AI
creative_and_media.floor: 13 for an Adobe ID; under-13 via schools under K-12 terms.
creative_and_media.quote: you affirm that you are of legal age to enter into the terms, or, if you are not, that you have obtained parental or guardian consent to enter into the terms. You must be 13 or older to register for an Adobe ID. Schools and their personnel may deploy Services to children under 13 consistent with the K-12 (Primary and Secondary) and Higher Education Additional Terms for Student Data.
creative_and_media.note: An explicit consent cure plus a named institutional path. One of the better-drafted terms in this audit.

creative_and_media.name: Remove.bg
creative_and_media.floor: 13 plus local uplift.
creative_and_media.quote: Children may not access or use any of the Services. For the purposes of these Terms of Service, a child is a person under the age of 13 (or the minimum legal age required to provide consent for processing of personal data in the country where the child is located).
creative_and_media.note: Background removal only, no likeness generation, default adult-content ban. The lowest-risk image tool audited.

creative_and_media.name: Meta's Animated Drawings
creative_and_media.floor: 13 via Meta's terms.
creative_and_media.quote: We try to make Facebook broadly available to everyone, but you cannot use Facebook if: You are under 13 years old.
creative_and_media.note: Animates children's drawings, not real-person likenesses. The demo frames the PARENT as operator. Contributing to the research dataset is opt-in.

creative_and_media.name: Plask.ai
creative_and_media.floor: 13; 13-17 need prior WRITTEN parental consent.
creative_and_media.quote: The Service is not intended for children under the age of 13. If you are under 13, do not use the Service. If you are age 13 or over but under age 18, you may use the Service only with the prior written consent of your parent or legal guardian.
creative_and_media.note: CONFLICT: the same terms say "You may only utilize the Service for personal non-commercial use", and this is a paid course. Needs written confirmation or an education tier before it is taught.

creative_and_media.name: Teachable Machine
creative_and_media.floor: None for the tool; a Google Account (13+) only if you save your work.
creative_and_media.quote: For all countries not listed below, 13 is the minimum age to manage your own Google Account.
creative_and_media.note: Trains in the browser with no sign-in needed. One of only two tools in this audit genuinely built for this age group.

creative_and_media.name: Machine Learning for Kids
creative_and_media.floor: None general; teacher-provisioned accounts.
creative_and_media.quote: Students cannot create their own accounts. Teachers and schools are responsible for... obtaining parental consent.
creative_and_media.note: The other tool genuinely built for this age group.

creative_and_media.name: CreateML
creative_and_media.floor: Apple Account 13; 14, 15 or 16 in some countries; 18 in Brazil and TEXAS.
creative_and_media.quote: Apple Media Services age requirements vary by country of residence.
creative_and_media.note: Texas sits inside our US market at 18. The practical barrier is needing a Mac. The 18+ Developer Program is a red herring.

creative_and_media.name: Gradio
creative_and_media.floor: None for the pip library.
creative_and_media.quote: No age clause exists for the library.
creative_and_media.note: Local use only. share=True opens a tunnel into the student's machine. Deploying to Spaces inherits Hugging Face's exposure.

creative_and_media.name: Streamlit
creative_and_media.floor: Library: none. Community Cloud: 18.
creative_and_media.quote: You must be 18 or older to use Streamlit Community Cloud.
creative_and_media.note: Local only. If a deployment lesson is ever added, this and Gradio both stop qualifying.

creative_and_media.name: Scenario
creative_and_media.floor: 16; 16-18 with guardian consent.
creative_and_media.quote: You must be at least sixteen (16) years of age to use the Platform. If you are between 16 and 18 years of age (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction), you may only use the Platform with the consent of a parent or legal guardian.
creative_and_media.note: Its content policy is the BEST in the whole audit: it bans all sexually explicit content by default with no opt-in adult mode, and requires verifiable consent for deepfakes of real people. It fails our 13-15s purely on the 16 floor. The consent sentence covers only 16-18, so it does not reach under-16s. The domain moved from scenario.gg.

creative_and_media.name: Sudowrite
creative_and_media.floor: 18 flat.
creative_and_media.quote: You must be at least 18 years of age to use the Website and Services.
creative_and_media.note: The most serious finding in this audit. It markets an "Adult Writing Prompt Generator | AI Story Ideas for Fiction & Erotica" with a "General Content / Adult Content (18+ Only)" selector and a guide on "erotica that doesn't fade to black". Adult content is user-selectable, not blocked. Its terms bar only sexual content featuring minors.

creative_and_media.name: Avatarify
creative_and_media.floor: Rated 4+ on the App Store, the most permissive rating Apple issues.
creative_and_media.quote: App Store age rating: 4+.
creative_and_media.note: Deepfake face-puppeteering marketed as making "clips with celebrities". Alive, despite being widely assumed dead. The one tool a young child could use to deepfake a classmate with zero friction.

creative_and_media.name: Rosebud.ai
creative_and_media.floor: 13 plus local uplift, so it passes on age.
creative_and_media.quote: THE SERVICES ARE NOT INTENDED FOR USERS UNDER THE AGE OF 13 OR THE LOWEST AGE PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW.
creative_and_media.note: Ships Tokkingheads: "PUPPET ANY AVATAR FROM JUST AN IMAGE". Its terms contain zero instances of "likeness", "deepfake" or "real person"; the sole right-of-publicity mention is in the INDEMNITY, pushing liability onto the user. May return if the syllabus uses Game Maker only and blocks Tokkingheads.

creative_and_media.name: Deep Nostalgia
creative_and_media.floor: 13; 14 in Israel, Spain and Korea; 16 in California.
creative_and_media.quote: Age requirements vary by jurisdiction.
creative_and_media.note: Animates real, often deceased, people.

creative_and_media.name: Immersity AI (formerly LeiaPix)
creative_and_media.floor: 18 flat.
creative_and_media.quote: you may not and must not use or access the Services if: You are under 18 years old.
creative_and_media.note: LeiaPix and Immersity are the SAME product; leiapix.com redirects here. Our tool list double-counted it. Adult content is banned by default.

creative_and_media.name: Krisp.ai
creative_and_media.floor: 16, plus express legal age AND capacity.
creative_and_media.quote: REPRESENT THAT YOU ARE OF LEGAL AGE AND CAPACITY TO ENTER INTO A BINDING AGREEMENT ... Company does not knowingly collect information from children under the age of 16.
creative_and_media.note: Two independent bars, so it cannot simply be banded 16+. It processes voice, which is biometric-adjacent.

creative_and_media.name: Interior AI
creative_and_media.floor: 18, or the age of majority, whichever is higher.
creative_and_media.quote: By using the Photo AI and Interior AI app, you agree that you are at least 18 years old or have reached the legal age of majority in your country of residence. If you are under 18 or the legal age in your country (whichever is higher), you are prohibited from using this app.
creative_and_media.note: It also bans uploading content "depicting minors (individuals under the age of 18)", so students could not use photos of themselves. Its legal page is served off-host from photoai.com, a likeness generator.

creative_and_media.name: Let's Enhance.io
creative_and_media.floor: 18, or the age of majority if higher, plus competence.
creative_and_media.quote: TO USE OUR SERVICES, YOU MUST BE AT LEAST EIGHTEEN (18) YEARS OF AGE OR, IF HIGHER, AT LEAST THE AGE OF MAJORITY IN YOUR JURISDICTION. YOU REPRESENT AND WARRANT THAT YOU MEET THE APPLICABLE AGE REQUIREMENTS AND ARE COMPETENT TO AGREE TO THESE TERMS.
creative_and_media.note: Three disqualifying triggers at once.

creative_and_media.name: Designs.ai
creative_and_media.floor: The legal age of your country of residence, roughly 18.
creative_and_media.quote: You must be of the legal age of your country of residence.
creative_and_media.note: A contract-capacity bar. Now Pixlr-operated.

creative_and_media.name: Artflow.ai
creative_and_media.floor: 13 general; 18 in the EU and UK.
creative_and_media.quote: you must be at least eighteen (18) years old.
creative_and_media.note: The EU/UK 18 is decisive on its own.

creative_and_media.name: Dream by Wombo
creative_and_media.floor: 13 per the App Store.
creative_and_media.quote: App Store age rating: 13+.
creative_and_media.note: Listed with "Mature or Suggestive Themes" and open user-generated content. The vendor's own linked terms 404.

creative_and_media.name: Cleanup.pictures
creative_and_media.floor: Cannot be established. The governing terms do not render.
creative_and_media.quote: No quote available: clipdrop.co/terms, /terms-visitor and /privacy each return HTTP 200 with roughly 400 characters of navigation and no document body, in curl and in headless Chrome.
creative_and_media.note: Governed by Clipdrop. Terms that cannot be read cannot clear anyone.

creative_and_media.name: Promethean AI
creative_and_media.floor: None published, in any market.
creative_and_media.quote: No age clause exists: the 33,000-character licence contains zero instances of minor, child, eligibility or majority.
creative_and_media.note: Silence is not permission.

creative_and_media.name: Spark AR (Meta)
creative_and_media.floor: Not applicable. Shut down 14 January 2025.
creative_and_media.quote: we have made the decision to shut down Meta Spark's platform of third party tools and content, effective Tuesday, January 14, 2025.
creative_and_media.note: Confirmed from Meta's own announcement.

creative_and_media.name: RADiCAL
creative_and_media.floor: Not applicable. Absorbed into Autodesk Flow Studio.
creative_and_media.quote: getrad.co and radicalmotion.com both redirect to autodesk.com/products/flow-studio/.
creative_and_media.note: The successor would independently fail on capacity to contract.

creative_and_media.name: This House Does Not Exist
creative_and_media.floor: Not applicable. A GoDaddy parking page.
creative_and_media.quote: The page body redirects to /lander, which loads GoDaddy's parking-lander script.
creative_and_media.note: The sibling thispersondoesnotexist.com was found ALIVE by this audit, contradicting an earlier round that reported it parked. Both are excluded regardless; neither publishes terms or an age policy.

business_and_productivity.name: Bubble.io
business_and_productivity.quote: TO USE THE PLATFORM, YOU MUST BE 18 OR OLDER (or the age of majority in the jurisdiction from which you are accessing the Platform), OR BE 13 OR OLDER AND HAVE YOUR PARENT OR GUARDIAN'S CONSENT.
business_and_productivity.note: An explicit disjunctive consent cure. Marketplace purchases are 18-only, so keep students off paid components.

business_and_productivity.name: Glide Apps
business_and_productivity.floor: 13; the guardian accepts on the child's behalf.
business_and_productivity.quote: The Service is available only for individuals aged 13 years or older... You agree to have your parent or guardian review and accept this Agreement on your behalf.
business_and_productivity.note: The majority uplift is expressly cured, and the minor remains the user.

business_and_productivity.name: Voiceflow
business_and_productivity.floor: 13; the guardian accepts on the child's behalf.
business_and_productivity.quote: The Service is available only for individuals aged 13 years or older... You agree to have your parent or guardian review and accept these Terms of Service on your behalf.
business_and_productivity.note: The same template as Glide.

business_and_productivity.name: Botpress
business_and_productivity.quote: Children under 16 years of age should not use our Service or Website or provide Botpress with any personal data without the consent of a parent or legal guardian.
business_and_productivity.note: Its Terms contain the word "age" zero times: a pure B2B agreement with no eligibility clause.

business_and_productivity.name: Jenni AI
business_and_productivity.floor: 13, with parental permission and direct supervision.
business_and_productivity.quote: The Services are intended for users who are at least 13 years of age. All users who are minors in the jurisdiction in which they reside (generally under the age of 18) must have the permission of, and be directly supervised by, their parent or guardian to use the Services.
business_and_productivity.note: The OPPOSITE of QuillBot on integrity: it ships no AI Humanizer or detector (those URLs 404) and states "We do not generate entire essays, and we do not endorse cheating or plagiarism." Two caveats: its own SEO title markets "AI Essay Writer" while the body disclaims essay generation, and the integrity promise lives in marketing copy rather than the contract, so it is a claim, not a term.

business_and_productivity.name: Beautiful.ai
business_and_productivity.floor: Authorized Users 13. The Customer, meaning the contracting party, must be 18.
business_and_productivity.quote: Customer must be at least 18 years of age or the age of majority in Customer's jurisdiction... Customer must ensure, and represents and warrants, that each Authorized User is at least 13 years of age, or the equivalent minimum age in the relevant jurisdiction.
business_and_productivity.note: Lawful ONLY if the school or the parent holds the Customer account and seats the student as an Authorized User. Student self-signup fails.

business_and_productivity.name: Notion AI
business_and_productivity.quote: Vendor terms set a 14 floor.
business_and_productivity.note: A clean floor of 14, so our 14-18 students may use it.

business_and_productivity.name: Blackbox AI
business_and_productivity.quote: Vendor terms set a 14 floor.
business_and_productivity.note: A clean floor of 14.

business_and_productivity.name: IFTTT
business_and_productivity.quote: We do not knowingly collect or solicit personal information from anyone under the age of 16. If you are under 16, please do not attempt to register for the Services.
business_and_productivity.note: Its Terms offer a consent cure but its privacy policy imposes a hard 16 registration bar and commits to deleting under-16 data, so a 13-15 account is deletion-eligible by the vendor's own policy. It also requires connecting third-party accounts a minor may not hold.

business_and_productivity.name: AskCodi
business_and_productivity.quote: Vendor terms set a 16 floor.
business_and_productivity.note: A clean floor of 16.

business_and_productivity.name: Murf.ai
business_and_productivity.quote: Vendor terms set a 16 floor.
business_and_productivity.note: A clean floor of 16.

business_and_productivity.name: Lumen5
business_and_productivity.quote: Vendor terms set a 16 floor.
business_and_productivity.note: A clean floor of 16.

business_and_productivity.name: Loudly
business_and_productivity.quote: Vendor terms set a 16 floor.
business_and_productivity.note: A clean floor of 16.

business_and_productivity.name: Gamma.app
business_and_productivity.floor: 16 AND legal age to form a binding contract.
business_and_productivity.quote: You represent that you are (i) at least sixteen (16) years old; (ii) of legal age to form a binding contract.
business_and_productivity.note: Two independent bars. The contract-capacity clause resolves to 18 in India, so this cannot be banded as simply 16+.

business_and_productivity.name: Zapier AI
business_and_productivity.quote: In order to open and maintain a Zapier Account, you hereby represent, warrant, and covenant that you have the legal capacity (including, without limitation, being of sufficient age) to enter into contracts under the law of the jurisdiction in which you reside.
business_and_productivity.note: The only age-related clause in the entire Terms: no 13 floor, no consent carve-out. It also connects thousands of third-party accounts a minor cannot hold.

business_and_productivity.name: Hootsuite
business_and_productivity.quote: You will only use the Self-Serve Services for business and professional reasons and not for individual purposes... You are at least 18 years old or otherwise able to enter into a legally binding agreement.
business_and_productivity.note: A double bar: age AND business-purpose-only. A student is an "individual purpose".

business_and_productivity.name: Buffer
business_and_productivity.quote: You must be at least 18-years old to use the Service.
business_and_productivity.note: Stated twice in the document.

business_and_productivity.name: Looka
business_and_productivity.quote: You hereby confirm that you are at least 18 years of age and will not use Looka Service or End Products for any unlawful purposes.
business_and_productivity.note: No consent path.

business_and_productivity.name: Tidio
business_and_productivity.floor: No age bar at all. A CATEGORY bar.
business_and_productivity.quote: TIDIO PROVIDES THE SERVICE ONLY FOR BUSINESS OR PROFESSIONAL PARTNERS AND REFRAINS FROM PROVIDING THE SERVICE TO CONSUMERS, UNDERSTOOD AS NATURAL PERSONS WHO ORDER THE SERVICE WITHOUT DIRECT RELATION TO THEIR COMMERCIAL OR PROFESSIONAL ACTIVITY.
business_and_productivity.note: A student is definitionally a consumer, so the vendor contractually refuses them. An age-only review would have missed this entirely.

business_and_productivity.name: PitchBob
business_and_productivity.quote: No quote available: /terms and /privacy-policy return HTTP 200 with the correct page title and an empty document body.
business_and_productivity.note: An EU controller (Disruptive Partners OU, Tallinn) with no published privacy policy, being handed minors' data. A data-protection problem independent of age.

business_and_productivity.name: Clockwise
business_and_productivity.quote: the Clockwise team is joining Salesforce... Clockwise will be going away. Our product will no longer be available starting on March 27, 2026.
business_and_productivity.note: Every legal URL returns HTTP 200 while silently serving the homepage, so automated link checks report it healthy forever.

business_and_productivity.name: Adalo
business_and_productivity.floor: Its privacy policy says 13 plus local uplift, but the governing Terms of Use cannot be read.
business_and_productivity.quote: The Services are not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age required by applicable law).
business_and_productivity.note: The privacy policy is "incorporated into and subject to the Adalo Terms of Use", and that document 404s at every URL pattern and is absent from the sitemap. This is the QuillBot and Learneo trap with the incorporated document withheld. Do not clear it on the privacy policy's 13.

business_and_productivity.name: Softr
business_and_productivity.quote: No age clause exists: the Terms (36,254 characters) and Privacy Policy (49,856 characters) were both read in full, with zero hits for age, minor, guardian, child, majority or capacity.
business_and_productivity.note: The absence of a floor is not permission.

business_and_productivity.name: Make.com
business_and_productivity.quote: No age clause exists in the 14-page Master Service Agreement (counterparty: Celonis, Inc.) or the privacy notice.
business_and_productivity.note: The page at /terms-and-conditions is a link hub, not the contract. It also requires connecting third-party accounts a minor cannot hold, which is its only real gate.

business_and_productivity.name: Namelix
business_and_productivity.floor: No document governs namelix.com at all.
business_and_productivity.quote: namelix.com publishes no terms and no privacy policy; parent Brandmark's terms are scoped to brandmark.io and never mention Namelix.
business_and_productivity.note: If the parent's terms were held to apply, they are age-of-majority.

business_and_productivity.name: BeeDone
business_and_productivity.quote: No age clause exists in either the Terms or the Privacy Policy, both read in full.
business_and_productivity.note: French-law governed. The privacy policy has no legal basis, controller identity, retention or transfer mechanism, so it is not GDPR-adequate for EU or UK minors.

business_and_productivity.name: Forest
business_and_productivity.quote: No age clause exists: the Terms contain the word "age" zero times.
business_and_productivity.note: The Terms were last updated 25 April 2018. An eight-year-stale contract on a tool aimed at students is its own flag.

business_and_productivity.name: Grammarly
business_and_productivity.floor: 13 in the US, UK and India; 16 in the EU, and consent expressly cannot cure it.
business_and_productivity.quote: you must be old enough to consent by yourself and not by a parent or guardian.
business_and_productivity.note: One of very few vendors to state explicitly that parental consent is NOT a route.

business_and_productivity.name: Otter.ai
business_and_productivity.quote: Vendor terms set a 13 floor.
business_and_productivity.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

business_and_productivity.name: Reclaim.ai
business_and_productivity.quote: Vendor terms set a 13 floor.
business_and_productivity.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

music_and_video.name: Suno AI
music_and_video.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

music_and_video.name: Boomy
music_and_video.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

music_and_video.name: Soundraw
music_and_video.floor: No numeric floor; minors need a legal representative's prior consent.
music_and_video.quote: If the Applicant is a minor, his/her legal representative (person with parental authority, etc.) shall review the Terms and apply for registration for the Service after obtaining the consent of his/her legal representative in advance.
music_and_video.note: Japanese-law drafting. Watch out: the numbers 13, 16 and 18 appear in this document as ARTICLE numbers, not ages.

music_and_video.name: Runway ML
music_and_video.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

music_and_video.name: Pictory.ai
music_and_video.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

music_and_video.name: Kapwing AI
music_and_video.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

music_and_video.name: Descript
music_and_video.note: Cleared in the first audit round.

music_and_video.name: GitHub Copilot
music_and_video.note: Cleared in the first audit round. The only AI coding assistant of eight that survived.

music_and_video.name: InVideo AI
music_and_video.quote: Vendor terms set an 18 floor in India.
music_and_video.note: Fails our primary market specifically, under the DPDP Act 2023.

music_and_video.name: Beatoven.ai
music_and_video.quote: Children are not eligible to use the Service.

music_and_video.name: Resemble.ai, WellSaid Labs, Listnr, Play.ht, Replica Studios
music_and_video.quote: Vendor terms set 18 floors; Play.ht and Replica Studios are no longer operating.
music_and_video.note: The voice-cloning cluster. Replica Studios' own farewell reads "goodbye, for now, probably forever".

music_and_video.name: Jukebox, Wonder Studio, Codeium, Codex API, Tome, Lobe, MonkeyLearn, Obviously.ai, Levity, Motion.ai, Socratic
music_and_video.quote: Each of these products has shut down, been renamed, or been absorbed.
music_and_video.note: Eleven dead products that were still in the syllabus. Socratic was killed by Google in 2024; Codeium became Windsurf; Obviously.ai became Zams; MonkeyLearn became Medallia.

music_and_video.name: Tabnine and Amazon Q Developer
music_and_video.note: Amazon Q was reached by renaming CodeWhisperer in an earlier pass, which fixed the spelling of the problem rather than the problem.

music_and_video.name: NovelAI, AI Dungeon, Lensa AI, FaceApp, Photoleap, Prisma
music_and_video.floor: 18, or 18 in the EEA and UK.
music_and_video.note: NovelAI is a known adult-content platform. AI Dungeon's only hard content ban is CSAM. FaceApp appeared in the syllabus as "with supervision", and supervision does not cure an age bar.
